benefits.description: Vision improvement, reported 20/0 vision (off the charts), resolution of dry eyes from sjogrens
Brain health benefits as part of vision combo protocol
Blood vessel peptide benefits as part of combo

protocol_notes: Part of 'vision combo' stack with multiple peptides. Used alongside vitamins and antioxidants (astaxanthin). Cycles repeated yearly. Previously had bionic vision (20/10) as child, maintained excellent vision into 40s with additional improvement reported. Also uses binoculars frequently. Sinus and sjogrens resolved but attributes this to multiple factors beyond peptides alone.
